positive: A minimalist line-art illustration of a whimsical, stylized astronaut gently floating through a cosmic forest. The scene features bioluminescent, abstract alien flora and massive, gentle celestial spheres in the background. The astronaut is depicted in a clean, flowing suit, carrying a small, glowing orb. Focus on deep blacks, ethereal blues, magenta accents, and pops of neon cyan for contrast. Style should be clean vector art mixed with detailed etching, suitable for screen printing. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt chest print. High contrast, sharp lines, graphic novel aesthetic.
